DISCOVERY 610, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER STRIKING CLAIM IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF TO MOVE FOR DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CCP 583.310. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF (FOREFEITURE) PANDOLFI, MANUELA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $658.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT MANUELA PANDOLFI. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $165.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jun-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion for order striking claim is taken off calendar. Plaintiff to move for dismissal pursuant to CCP 583.310. Commissioner: PAUL SLAVIT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar May-04-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
